mapper.sql: id, task_name, algorithm_id, dataset_id, train_status, progress, epoch_current, epoch_total, accuracy, precision_value, recall_value, map_value, loss_value, gpu_usage, start_time, end_time, estimated_time, model_output_path, log_path, config_params, error_message, created_by, created_time, updated_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT t.*, a.name as algorithm_name, d.name as dataset_name, u.name as created_by_name FROM algorithm_training t LEFT JOIN algorithm a ON t.algorithm_id = a.id AND a.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN dataset d ON t.dataset_id = d.id AND d.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN user u ON t.created_by = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_tasks, COUNT(CASE WHEN train_status = 'pending' THEN 1 END) as pending_tasks, COUNT(CASE WHEN train_status = 'training' THEN 1 END) as training_tasks, COUNT(CASE WHEN train_status = 'completed' THEN 1 END) as completed_tasks, COUNT(CASE WHEN train_status = 'failed' THEN 1 END) as failed_tasks, ROUND( COUNT(CASE WHEN train_status = 'completed' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN train_status IN ('completed', 'failed') THEN 1 END), 0), 2 ) as success_rate, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN train_status = 'completed' THEN accuracy END), 4) as average_accuracy, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN train_status = 'completed' THEN precision_value END), 4) as average_precision, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN train_status = 'completed' THEN recall_value END), 4) as average_recall, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN train_status = 'completed' THEN map_value END), 4) as average_map, ROUND(AVG( CASE WHEN train_status = 'completed' AND start_time IS NOT NULL AND end_time IS NOT NULL THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, start_time, end_time) END ), 2) as average_duration, COUNT(CASE WHEN DATE(created_time) = CURDATE() THEN 1 END) as today_new_tasks, COUNT(CASE WHEN created_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) THEN 1 END) as weekly_new_tasks, COUNT(CASE WHEN created_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN 1 END) as monthly_new_tasks FROM algorithm_training WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT FROM algorithm_training WHERE algorithm_id = #{algorithmId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT FROM algorithm_training WHERE dataset_id = #{datasetId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT FROM algorithm_training WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO algorithm_training
task_name, algorithm_id, dataset_id, train_status, progress, epoch_current, epoch_total, accuracy, precision_value, recall_value, map_value, loss_value, gpu_usage, start_time, end_time, estimated_time, model_output_path, log_path, config_params, error_message, created_by, created_time,
#{taskName}, #{algorithmId}, #{datasetId}, #{trainType}, #{trainStatus}, #{progress}, #{epochCurrent}, #{epochTotal}, #{accuracy}, #{precisionValue}, #{recallValue}, #{mapValue}, #{lossValue}, #{gpuUsage}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{estimatedTime}, #{modelOutputPath}, #{logPath}, #{configParams}, #{errorMessage}, #{createdBy}, NOW(),
mapper.delete: UPDATE algorithm_training SET deleted = 1, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE algorithm_training SET deleted = 1, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
